title: BLMHTWO 2PCS Dog Spiky Toy, Durable Squeaky Balls Chew Toy Rubber Puppy Dental Ring Dog Toy Pool Rings for Small Medium Dogs Indoor Outdoor Training Teeth Cleaning (Blue, Orange)
features: 【Durable &Safe Material】: Our spiky ring dog toy is made of TPR rubber material, which has good elasticity, glossy surface, compression resistance and bite resistance, thick and durable, non-toxic, tasteless, safe for dog chewing and grinding .

【Efficiently Teeth Cleaning for Small Dog】: The spiky dog ball comes with soft burrs on the surface, dogs can clean their teeth and make their teeth and molar healthier during biting the toy. This ring toy is suitable for dogs under 20kg, such as Teddy, Poodle, Bibear etc.

【Squeaky Design】: This dog rubber ring has a built-in speaker design, this dog toy helps keeping your pup active, engaged, distracted and happy with hours of fun and play. Even if you are on a business trip or traveling, your pet won't feel lonely.

【Soft TPR Rubber】: The squeaky dog ring is made of TPR material, which is safe and non-toxic, safe for your dog to chew. different form plastic material, the TPR material is soft, will never hurt dog's teeth or gums . Safe and healthy, it is a good training toy for dogs.
【Perfect Gift】: This squeaky ring dog toy is exquisite and bright in color. It can be given as a gift to your baby puppy or to your family or friends who have bogs.
